name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Đà Nẵng (Pullman Danang Beach Resort)
address: 101 Đường V Nguy n Gi p, Ngũ H nh Sơn , Hòa Hải, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam
description:
Khám Phá Pullman Danang Beach Resort - Thiên Đường Nghỉ Dưỡng Tại Đà Nẵng

Nằm cách trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng chỉ 5 km và cách sân bay quốc tế khoảng 10 phút lái xe, Pullman Danang Beach Resort là điểm đến lý tưởng cho du khách muốn trải nghiệm vẻ đẹp biển xanh và dịch vụ cao cấp. Khách sạn được xây dựng từ năm 2010, mang đến không gian hiện đại, sang trọng và tiện nghi đẳng cấp, phù hợp cho cả kỳ nghỉ gia đình, kỳ nghỉ lãng mạn hay công tác.

Với tổng cộng 186 phòng nghỉ rộng rãi và trang bị đầy đủ tiện nghi, Pullman Danang Beach Resort cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm thoải mái nhất cho khách hàng. Khách có thể nhận phòng từ 15:00 và trả phòng đến 12:00 trưa hôm sau, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi để lên kế hoạch cho chuyến đi của mình. Đặc biệt, khách sạn còn có chính sách thân thiện với trẻ em, cho phép trẻ từ 2 đến 11 tuổi ở miễn phí, giúp gia đình có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn mà không lo về chi phí phụ thêm.

Các tiện nghi giải trí tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Pullman Danang Beach Resort tọa lạc tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm những giây phút thư giãn và giải trí tuyệt vời. Khách sạn này có đầy đủ các tiện nghi giải trí để bạn có thể tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ.

Nằm trong khuôn viên của khách sạn là một số cửa hàng đa dạng, nơi bạn có thể mua sắm những món đồ yêu thích. Ngoài ra, Pullman Danang Beach Resort còn có một quầy bar thân thiện, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các loại đồ uống ngon và thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá thành phố.

Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và làm mới bản thân, khách sạn cũng cung cấp các dịch vụ massage chuyên nghiệp, bồn tắm nóng, phòng xông hơi và spa. Bạn cũng có thể thư giãn trong khu vườn xanh mát hoặc tận hưởng không gian chung với TV để xem các chương trình giải trí. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một cửa hàng quà lưu niệm, nơi bạn có thể tìm những món quà độc đáo để mang về như kỷ niệm về kỳ nghỉ của mình tại Đà Nẵng.

Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Đẳng Cấp Tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Pullman Danang Beach Resort tự hào mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm thể thao đa dạng và phong phú trong không gian nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng. Khách có thể tận hưởng các hoạt động thể dục tại trung tâm thể hình miễn phí, trang bị hiện đại giúp duy trì phong độ và sức khỏe trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Đối với những người yêu thích tennis, resort có các sân tennis chất lượng cao, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng để thi đấu và rèn luyện kỹ năng. Ngoài ra, resort còn cung cấp các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước không động cơ như lướt ván, chèo thuyền kayak, và các thiết bị thể thao nước đa dạng cho thuê, giúp du khách thỏa sức khám phá vẻ đẹp của biển xanh và cát trắng.

Không chỉ có vậy, resort còn sở hữu hồ bơi ngoài trời rộng lớn, lý tưởng để thư giãn hoặc tập luyện thể thao dưới nước. Khách có thể thưởng thức đồ uống tại quầy bar cạnh hồ bơi, tận hưởng không gian thoáng đãng và trong lành của bãi biển riêng tư. Với các tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng, Pullman Danang Beach Resort cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng trọn vẹn, kết hợp giữa thư giãn và hoạt động thể thao đẳng cấp ngay trong khuôn viên của mình.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Pullman Danang Beach Resort là một kỳ nghỉ lý tưởng tại Đà Nẵng với nhiều tiện ích tiện lợi để đảm bảo cho khách hàng có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và tiện nghi. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24/7, giặt là, dịch vụ phòng, két an toàn, lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong các khu vực công cộng, khu vực hút thuốc riêng biệt, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, giặt ủi, check-in/check-out nhanh chóng, giữ hành lý, dọn phòng hàng ngày.

Tiện Nghi Về Giao Thông Tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ vận chuyển tiện lợi và đa dạng để dễ dàng khám phá vẻ đẹp của Đà Nẵng. Resort cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay chuyên nghiệp, giúp quý khách di chuyển thuận tiện từ và đến sân bay một cách an toàn và thoải mái. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể tham gia các tour du lịch hấp dẫn được tổ chức bởi resort, mang đến những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ trong hành trình của mình.

Để thuận tiện cho việc di chuyển nội bộ, resort có hệ thống chỗ đậu xe rộng rãi, bao gồm cả dịch vụ đỗ xe tự phục vụ miễn phí ngay tại chỗ và bãi đậu xe trong khuôn viên resort. Dịch vụ taxi và bán vé cũng sẵn sàng phục vụ theo yêu cầu của khách, giúp mọi người dễ dàng di chuyển tới các điểm tham quan nổi bật trong thành phố. Với các tiện ích này, Pullman Danang Beach Resort cam kết mang đến cho du khách một kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn, thuận tiện từ khi đặt chân đến khi rời đi.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort, mỗi phòng nghỉ được trang bị đầy đủ các tiện nghi cao cấp nhằm mang đến trải nghiệm thoải mái và thư giãn tối đa cho khách lưu trú. Không gian phòng được trang bị điều hòa không khí hiện đại, giúp điều chỉnh nhiệt độ phù hợp với sở thích cá nhân. Khách còn có thể tận hưởng những buổi sáng sảng khoái nhờ tivi truyền hình vệ tinh/cáp, cùng với các tiện ích như minibar, refrigerator và bình đun nước điện để pha cà phê hoặc trà miễn phí, mang đến sự tiện lợi ngay trong tầm tay.

Phòng còn có ban công hoặc sân thượng, nơi bạn có thể ngắm nhìn toàn cảnh biển hoặc thành phố Đà Nẵng. Các tiện nghi khác như khăn tắm, đồ vệ sinh cá nhân, áo choàng tắm, máy sấy tóc và rèm che chắn ánh sáng giúp khách cảm thấy thoải mái như ở nhà. Đặc biệt, khách còn nhận được báo hàng ngày và các đồ dùng miễn phí như nước đóng chai, cà phê và trà nhanh để bắt đầu ngày mới thật năng lượng. Tất cả những tiện nghi này đều hướng đến việc mang lại sự tiện nghi tối đa và trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp cho khách hàng.

Trải nghiệm đa dạng ẩm thực tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Pullman Danang Beach Resort mang đến cho bạn một trải nghiệm ẩm thực đa dạng và phong phú. Khách sạn có nhà hàng và dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, đảm bảo rằng bạn luôn có thể tận hưởng các món ngon mọi lúc trong ngày. Bạn cũng có thể thưởng thức các món BBQ tại các tiện nghi BBQ của khách sạn. Với dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, bạn sẽ luôn có một không gian sạch sẽ và thoải mái để thưởng thức bữa ăn sáng tự chọn từ buffet đa dạng.

Khám Phá Các Loại Phòng Đa Dạng Tại Pullman Đà Nẵng Beach Resort

Pullman Đà Nẵng Beach Resort mang đến sự lựa chọn phong phú về các loại phòng phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng. Từ phòng Deluxe Queen Balcony rộng 42m² với ban công hướng biển, đến phòng Family Suite lớn 122m² với không gian thoáng đãng dành cho gia đình, mỗi phòng đều mang lại cảm giác thoải mái và sang trọng. Ngoài ra, du khách còn có thể lựa chọn các loại phòng cao cấp như Penthouse Suite cao cấp trên tầng cao, hoặc các phòng hướng biển như Deluxe Queen Ocean View và Deluxe 2 Single Beds Ocean View, mang đến trải nghiệm ngắm nhìn tuyệt đẹp của đại dương.

Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất cùng quy trình đặt phòng đơn giản, nhanh chóng và không gây phiền hà. Điều này giúp bạn dễ dàng chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi của mình mà không phải lo lắng về giá cả hay thủ tục, để tập trung tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại bãi biển tuyệt đẹp của Đà Nẵng.

Khám phá vùng Hòa Hải tại Đà Nẵng

Nằm tại bờ biển Đà Nẵng, khu vực Hòa Hải là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian biển xanh, cát trắng và nắng ấm. Pullman Danang Beach Resort tọa lạc ngay trên bãi biển Hòa Hải, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đáng nhớ. 

Hòa Hải nổi tiếng với khung cảnh thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp và không khí trong lành. Du khách có thể tham gia các hoạt động thể thao biển như lướt ván, lặn biển, hay tham gia các tour du thuyền khám phá vịnh Đà Nẵng. Nếu bạn muốn khám phá văn hóa địa phương, hãy ghé thăm ngôi chùa Linh Ứng nổi tiếng, nằm trên ngọn núi Sơn Trà, với tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp ra biển và thành phố. 

Với vị trí đắc địa và nhiều hoạt động thú vị, Hòa Hải là một điểm đến không thể bỏ qua khi đến Đà Nẵng. Pullman Danang Beach Resort chắc chắn sẽ mang đến cho bạn một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời, kết hợp giữa sự thoải mái và sự tiện nghi.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay gần Đà Nẵng đến Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Pullman Danang Beach Resort tọa lạc tại Hòa Hải, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời bên bãi biển tuyệt đẹp của Đà Nẵng. Để đến đến Pullman Danang Beach Resort từ sân bay gần Đà Nẵng, bạn có một số lựa chọn vận chuyển tiện lợi.

Cách đơn giản nhất để đến Pullman Danang Beach Resort là sử dụng dịch vụ xe đưa đón sân bay của khách sạn. Bạn có thể đặt trước dịch vụ này khi đặt phòng hoặc liên hệ với khách sạn trước để sắp xếp. Xe đưa đón sân bay sẽ đón bạn tại sân bay và đưa đến khách sạn một cách nhanh chóng và thuận tiện.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể di chuyển bằng taxi hoặc dùng dịch vụ xe đón khách công cộng. Tại sân bay, bạn sẽ tìm thấy nhiều công ty taxi và dịch vụ xe đón khách có mặt sẵn để phục vụ bạn. Hãy nhớ thỏa thuận giá cước trước khi lên xe và đảm bảo rằng bạn sử dụng dịch vụ của những công ty taxi và xe đón khách đáng tin cậy. Khoảng cách từ sân bay đến Pullman Danang Beach Resort là khoảng 7 km, và chuyến đi sẽ mất khoảng 15-20 phút tuỳ thuộc vào điều kiện giao thông.

Khám phá các điểm tham quan xung quanh Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Pullman Danang Beach Resort nằm cách một số điểm tham quan nổi tiếng ở Đà Nẵng chỉ trong khoảng cách ngắn. Ngũ Hành Sơn, một dãy núi tuyệt đẹp với những ngọn núi đá độc đáo, là một địa điểm không thể bỏ qua. Du khách có thể tận hưởng không gian yên bình và thư giãn tại bãi biển Non Nước, nơi có cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh.

Nếu bạn muốn khám phá văn hóa và tôn giáo của Đà Nẵng, Động Hoa Nghiêm và Đá mỹ nghệ Tư Hùng là những điểm đến thú vị. Động Hoa Nghiêm là một ngôi chùa nổi tiếng với kiến trúc đẹp mắt và không gian linh thiêng. Đá mỹ nghệ Tư Hùng là nơi trưng bày và bán các sản phẩm đá mỹ nghệ độc đáo của Đà Nẵng.

Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng nằm gần sân gôn Đà Nẵng, nơi du khách có thể tham gia vào môn thể thao này thú vị. Bệnh viện Phụ sản - Nhi Đà Nẵng cũng nằm trong khu vực gần khách sạn, đảm bảo an toàn và tiện lợi cho du khách. Động Âm Phủ, một ngôi đền cổ xưa, cũng là một điểm tham quan đáng chú ý.

Nhà hàng xung quanh Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Pullman Danang Beach Resort có vị trí thuận lợi với nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc sản tại Si Dining Restaurant, Hoas Place và Osteria Al Mare. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Việt Nam truyền thống, Hoa's Place là lựa chọn lý tưởng. Bên cạnh đó, Table 88, The Dining Room và The Grill cung cấp các món ăn quốc tế đa dạng và tinh tế. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và thưởng thức cocktail trong không gian biển, Azure Beach Lounge và Cape Nao Beach Club là những điểm đến không thể bỏ qua. Ngoài ra, Hung 68 Food And Coffee là địa điểm lý tưởng để thưởng thức cà phê và các món ăn nhẹ. Với sự đa dạng và chất lượng của các nhà hàng xung quanh, du khách tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort sẽ có trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời.

Những điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng xung quanh Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Nằm trong khu vực lân cận của Pullman Danang Beach Resort, du khách có thể tìm thấy những điểm mua sắm độc đáo và hấp dẫn. Trang sức Namaka, Làng đá mỹ nghệ Non Nước, M. Legrand, Cửa hàng đá Mỹ nghệ Tý Ngọc, Cửa hàng đá mỹ nghệ, Cơ sở Điêu khắc Đá Mỹ nghệ Xuất Ánh, Cơ sở sản xuất đá Mỹ nghệ Thủy Hòa và Cơ sở Điêu khắc đá mỹ nghệ Tiên Hiếu là những địa điểm không thể bỏ qua cho những ai yêu thích nghệ thuật đá mỹ nghệ. Với sự đa dạng về sản phẩm và chất lượng cao, du khách có thể tìm thấy những món quà độc đáo để mang về làm kỷ niệm hoặc tặng người thân yêu.

Giá trung bình phòng tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort so với giá trung bình phòng tại Đà Nẵng

Pullman Danang Beach Resort là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm kỳ nghỉ sang trọng và đẳng cấp tại Đà Nẵng. Với giá trung bình của một phòng là $227, khách sạn này mang đến một trải nghiệm đáng giá cho giá trị của bạn. So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại Đà Nẵng là $79, Pullman Danang Beach Resort có mức giá cao hơn, nhưng điều này đáng đồng tiền bát gạo với những tiện nghi và dịch vụ xuất sắc mà nó mang lại. Với vị trí tuyệt đẹp bên bờ biển và các tiện ích cao cấp như hồ bơi, nhà hàng và spa, bạn sẽ không thể tìm thấy một nơi nào khác tốt hơn Pullman Danang Beach Resort để thưởng thức kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng.

Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Pullman Danang Beach Resort

Chúng tôi đã rất thích ở đây và sẽ quay lại lần sau với con cái. Dịch vụ tuyệt vời, nhân viên rất tốt bụng và đáng yêu! Khách sạn và phòng rất sạch sẽ và nhân viên rất nhiệt tình và thân thiện. Nhân viên rất tốt và hỗ trợ. Điểm đến đẹp, đồ ăn ngon, phòng rất sạch sẽ, bãi biển tuyệt vời! Tất cả nhân viên đều rất thân thiện và hỗ trợ. Khách sạn đáng yêu, nhà hàng tuyệt vời, phòng tuyệt hảo, hồ bơi đẹp, quầy cocktail tuyệt vời. Nhân viên rất hỗ trợ, thông tin và chuyên nghiệp. Vị trí thuận tiện và nhân viên thân thiện, đồ ăn ngon.

Khách sạn Pullman Danang Beach Resort - Những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng

Khách sạn Pullman Danang Beach Resort đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng, với điểm số tổng thể ấn tượng là 8.9 trên 10. Điều này chứng tỏ sự hài lòng của khách hàng với chất lượng dịch vụ tại khách sạn. Đánh giá cao nhất được ghi nhận là về độ sạch sẽ với điểm số 9.1, cho thấy khách sạn luôn duy trì môi trường sạch sẽ và thoáng mát để khách hàng có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thoải mái tại đây.

Ngoài ra, khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao về vị trí của khách sạn với điểm số 9.0. Với vị trí nằm ngay bên bãi biển Đà Nẵng, khách sạn Pullman Danang Beach Resort mang đến cho khách hàng cảm giác thư giãn và hòa mình vào không gian biển xanh mát mẻ. Bên cạnh đó, đánh giá về hiệu suất nhân viên cũng rất cao với điểm số 9.1. Đội ngũ nhân viên tận tâm và chuyên nghiệp sẽ đảm bảo rằng khách hàng sẽ có một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ tại khách sạn Pullman Danang Beach Resort.

sample_comments.text: Gia đình 9 người đã sử dụng 4 phòng tại khách sạn Pullman Danang Beach Resort. Thời gian lưu trú từ ngày 2 đến 4 tháng 5 năm 2026, trong 2 đêm. Phòng mà 3 người sử dụng đã được cung cấp thêm giường phụ mà không tốn thêm chi phí. Khi chúng tôi yêu cầu hâm nóng thức ăn mang theo tại nhà hàng, họ cũng đã phục vụ rất tận tâm. Cảnh biển và hồ bơi nhìn từ phòng thật tuyệt vời. Sau khi bơi, khu vực xông hơi có sẵn áo choàng, nên thật tiện lợi khi tắm xong về phòng. Tình trạng phòng cũng rất tốt và nhân viên thì thân thiện, nên nếu có dịp đến Đà Nẵng, tôi muốn quay lại đây. Chỉ có điều sau khi trả phòng, việc hoàn tiền đặt cọc còn chậm trễ nên hơi đáng tiếc.
sample_comments.title: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Đà Nẵng Beach cùng gia đình có điều kiện tốt.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you very much for sharing your wonderful feedback following your recent family stay at Pullman Danang Beach Resort.

We are truly delighted to know that you and your family enjoyed the room condition, the beautiful views of the beach and swimming pool, as well as the comfort of our sauna facilities after swimming. It is also our pleasure to hear that the complimentary extra bed arrangement and the attentive support from our restaurant team helped make your stay more enjoyable and convenient.

Your kind words regarding our team's friendliness and service are sincerely appreciated and will certainly be shared with all Heartists. Knowing that you would like to return to our resort when visiting Danang again is the greatest encouragement for us.

sample_comments.title: Gia đình tôi có những ngày lưu trú rất tuyệt vời và sẽ quay lại Pullman
sample_comments.positives: Khách sạn có không gian thoáng rộng, biển đẹp và sạch sẽ. Bể bơi rất to, tôi thấy là bể bơi to nhất trong các chuỗi resort ven biển. Phòng khách sạn và nhà vệ sinh bố trí hợp lý, ở thoải mái. Bữa sáng xuất sắc, đa dạng, nhiều món ăn, đồ uống. Gia đình tôi đặc biệt thích quầy trứng và đồ ăn nước (mỳ , phở) . Tôi đánh giá rất cao những chai nước hoa quả đóng chai thủy tinh, thể hiện sự sạch sẽ, tươi mới. Nhà ăn có nhân viên đứng tất cả các vị trí, sẵn sàng hỗ trợ khách gọi đồ uống cafe và hỗ trợ khi cần. Thái độ của toàn bộ nhân viên rất tốt . Cách vận hành chung của khách sạn rất chuyên nghiệp, hiện đại , đẳng cấp, và tôi thấy xứng đáng với giá tiền.
sample_comments.negatives: Điều tôi thấy hơi phiền là buổi tối có nhiều khách gọi đồ ăn về phòng, sau đó họ để bát đĩa và đồ ăn thừa ra ngoài hành lang. Tuy nhiên vào lúc 7h30 sáng khi tôi đi ăn sáng thì thấy vẫn chưa được dọn. Nó tạo cảm giác không ok vào lúc sáng sớm. Khách sạn có thể bố trí người dọn đồ vào lúc sớm , hoặc nói khách chủ động gọi lễ tân để dọn thay vì các phòng để đồ ăn ra ngoài hành lang.

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: The pool and spa are phenomenal, and are very large and spacious. The hotel staff and concierge are friendly and helpful for giving directions and information about the area.

sample_comments.text: Nhân viên rất thân thiện và quy trình check-in, check-out diễn ra nhanh chóng và tốt. Tôi đã sử dụng dịch vụ cùng gia đình, và giường ngủ cũng như phòng tắm đều rộng rãi nên không có gì bất tiện. Hồ bơi cũng có cả chỗ nông và chỗ sâu, rất vui và bữa sáng thì đa dạng và ngon miệng, tôi đã ăn rất no. Gần đó cũng có siêu thị và nhà hàng Hàn Quốc, nên không lo lắng về việc ăn uống. Nếu có dịp quay lại Đà Nẵng, tôi sẽ lại sử dụng dịch vụ này. Đà Nẵng thật tuyệt!

sample_comments.title: Great location, dated hotel, so-so service
sample_comments.text:
Perhaps our expectations were too high considering it was a Pullman, but must admit that we felt it was far from a 5-star hotel & far from what we have experienced at previous Pullman stays. While the grounds were beautiful, the beach area perfect and the location great for access to the city (and even a few good local restaurants close by) that is where the 5 star experience ended.

The room was pretty standard with the bare minimum regarding furnishings and extras. The shower was so dirty looking with moldy grout that we were happy the hotel supplied flip flops as we would not have stepped in the shower without something on our feet. Everyday we had to request something from housekeeping, usually more towels as the shower curtain ended about 1 foot from the floor and much of the bathroom was covered in water after a shower. The room was also in desperate need of a paint job.

The breakfast was plentiful with lots of selection but often the trays were empty unless you were there very early. The tea & coffee were self serve which was not the issue but seldom was your tea or coffee hot. And once again the restaurant, like the hotel room, just looked tired & in desperate need of some fresh paint.

The staff were either very pleasant & friendly or the exact opposite and didn't seem to really care....nothing in between.

But perhaps our lasting impression of the Pullman Beach Resort will be that in over 25 years of traveling all corners of the globe, we have only checked into a hotel room twice and requested housekeeping to the room to clean again. Always makes for a good story when you return home but certainly doesn't put the Pullman in a good light.

sample_comments.title: A Fool And His Money Are Soon Parted
sample_comments.text: Nothing good to say about this hotel at all. When we arrived early (which was arranged in 3 emails to arrive at 10.00 am) we were told to go away until 2.00pm then we can check in. The reception staff were disgraceful, unfriendly, rude and arrogant. When I finally checked in at 2.00pm I was told that "they were busy" and another 40 minutes later we got our room, then no luggage because it was forgotten about and left at reception. From here it just went down hill. They claim to be a 5 star resort, it is actually just barely a 3 star hotel - NOT A RESORT. The absolute rubbish that previous guests have written saying it was fantastic and great staff is just not true. I even emailed the general manager who made no apology and that if I wanted to see he to call and he would try to find the time to see me before i left, this is not close to being satisfactory in what they claim to be 5 star. The pool staff are lazy and allowed children to urinate in the pool actually watching and laughing - maybe its different if your a local maybe the same hygiene rules don't apply. The pictures on the website don't match the actual hotel eg. the gym is barely equipped and is so poorly placed that its not worth going to - the gym is located between the pool toilets and the pool bar area so all the guests and staff use it a short cut and are noisy and distracting when all you want to do is have some quiet time in the gym. Overall food and room service was inconsistent eg order the same dish one night and the serving and food is different the next time despite being charged the same price. Overall I would never ever recommend this hotel to anyone, I wouldn't even send my ex-wife there, its that poor. There is no shuttle bus to take you to Danang (15 minutes away) but the shuttle bus will take you to Hoi An (30 minutes away) nothing makes sense.

The smell of insects repellent (or, kind of stronger!) were follow from the first to forth floor of the hotel and inside the room. The beach side is dirty and we didn't see anyone care about broken glass, cigarettes or plastic bags and small rubbish around and under the sands. The only good service we found was at the restaurant and beach bar. As well as receptionist who was helping us to check out- was good and very well educated. We had 8 hours free after we checked out and we spent it on the beach. We left our baggage at the luggage area together with handbags. The manager told us to take cash and credit cards out as she was not sure about the security and honesty of her colleagues. We took out cash and credit cards from one bag but another. Sure, when we were leaving the money disappeared. The front manager was shouting that it's totally our fault that she was telling us to take it out. The amount of the cash there were not that big. What is the most disappointing that there were nothing like a proper lockers or secure service for such an occasion. Anyway, the sea and weather was good.

sample_comments.title: Awesome Stay !
sample_comments.positives:
Everything was awesome ! Staff from reception to concierge , to the house keeping, to restaurants and life guards, everyone was always happy and warm. Staff NY gave us a good start when we check in, patiently helping us on the check in as we were too early for the check in time, explaining the facilities and program. 
Value add program like Yoga lessons from instructor Thuynguyen was great too, we enjoyed thoroughly. Free use of surfing board, kayak is really a plus, with such attentive life guards always. The swimming pool itself is big enough for kids to play, and for people who want to do some swimming. 
Breakfast was awesome daily. Had our fill that lunch can be skipped.
One of my friend even got to do baguette lessons with the chef one of the afternoon.

We also had a dinner buffet with good spread of seafood and meat, and wine too!
The resort is sitting on My Khe beach, and guests have a private beach , and the beautiful and clean beach is really a big plus why we choose Pullman resort. We had a good brisk walk daily on the beach for an hour before going for our breakfast. And the best opportunity to catch the sunrise at 5.30am rising from the horizon of South China Sea. 
Lots of sun loungers to cater for guests with a bar counter and beach lounge. 

Overall, a wonderful stay in Pullman Danang Beach Resort.

2. The carpet in the middle of the room should be removed because It's hard and dirty.
3. The soaking tub must have a non-slip mat inside because it is very slippery. It made me slip and fall painfully.
4. The shower area should have a curtain or sliding door to prevent water from splashing out and wetting the room. The toilet area should also should have a sliding door.
5. Around 3 ~4 am on July/22/2024, I was woken up by the bathroom light suddenly turning on. When I sat up in bed and wondered if anyone could have come into the room, about 5 minutes later the light turned off by itself. So scare!
And many other things that a 5 starts resort need to review and improve.

sample_comments.title: Hardware is good but more work on staff training
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at Pullman for 3 nights during Chinese New Year, and it didn't come to our surprise with lots of Mainlander friends. The overall hardward of the hotel didn't let the name of Pullman (5-star) down, but I found that most of the staff I came across in restaurant, reception and pool side carry an angry faces with them. And staff at poolside never offered to give you a free bottle of water or provide you with towel, you had to test your luck to locate the beach towel. Most importantly they were all pretty busy to chit chat with their colleagues and shouted at each others every day. One day of our stay, the staff came inside of our room to fix a door without notified us. I was quite surprise with the unexpected visitor and lucky that we were all dressed at that time.
I understand that there is a service gap between Vietname with Bangkok, Phuket and Bali, etc.. Yet there are many big-chain opened new resorts in Danang and staff training is critical to make this city becomes another resort paradise.

sample_comments.negatives: alles gut

sample_comments.title: An enigma wrapped in a riddle
sample_comments.text:
Like the title says, this place just confused the heck out of me. Compared to standard hotels in Vietnam, and throughout much of the rest of my SE Asia trip, this place was great, beautiful, and comfortable. However, the level of customer service and limitations of the amenities confused me.

Problems:

 Pool bar/restaurant stops serving food at 9 and is closed by 10. Lobby and restaurant stops serving food at 10 as well. No room service after 10. Pool closes at 6. Hotel staff kick everyone off the beach at 6. I understand this is a quiet resort, but since it's pretty desolate in the immediate area, it'd be nice to have access to the features and amenities later. 

 Location: very inconvenient without your own transportation unless you want to be restricted by the hotel's van. Cabs are relatively expensive if you're heading into Danang, and certainly expensive if you were to take the 30km trip into Hoi An. My friend and I rented scooters for the 3 day stay to have a way around.

 Dining: The on-site restaurant and most of the food in the resort are extraordinarily overpriced for their quality. I was very happy to pay the 10$ for a sandwich, 15$ for an entree, since we were at a resort, but I expected the quality to match. The breakfast buffet was very good, but dinner was not.
sample_comments.positives: beautiful rooms and common areas, awesome pool, pristine beach

sample_comments.title: Hier würde ich sofort wieder hin.
sample_comments.positives:
Die Zimmer sind groß, sauber, toll ausgestattet. 
Das Personal ist top, super freundlich, interessiert an Konversation und hilfsbereit. 
Das Frühstücksbüffet ist sehr vielfältig und alles schmeckt sehr gut. Zugang zu Strand ist perfekt, Speisen sind mit Allergenen gekennzeichnet, der Chef-Koch ist sehr nett und hilf einem gerne bei der Essensauswahl weiter. 
Das Lobbypersonal ist super hilfsbereit. 

Mit dem Grab-Taxi kommt man für 2€ in die belebten Gegenden von Da Nang. 
Für 10€ kommt man nach Hoi An. Der Shuttle Bus vom Hotel ist günstiger.
sample_comments.negatives:
Rings um die Strandliegen könnte es etwas sauberer sein. Die Einrichtung im Restaurant ist schon etwas älter und evtl nicht mehr so modisch, aber in gutem Zustand. Die Messer könnten schärfer sein. ...also nur Kleinigkeiten. 
Die Speisen und Getränke haben europäisches Niveau und sind für die Region sehr teuer.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing for a 5-star Danang beach resort
sample_comments.text: As a top line 5-star beach resort, we had higher expectations for an international brand like Pullman. This one was a let down: very ordinary and aged feeling room, and an overall resort with the minimum of facilities highlighted by a small pool that was unusable during day time given the unbearable heat without any shade of trees. The beach access was a plus and the breakfast spread was superb, but did not make up for the overall lower quality of experience.

sample_comments.title: A bit disappointing
sample_comments.text: I expected quite a lot for Pullman as it is under Accor Group, however I will not choose it again the next time. As a resort hotel, Pullman doesn't have many facilities, only a small swimming pool and a gym. F&B facilities are not great, only a all-day international restaurant and 2 bars. Location wise it is just on My Khe Beach but the beach itself is not attempting at all - big waves and not suitable for swimming. Staff are friendly but English level can be improved. Design of the room is really awful to me - no extra doors for toilet and shower corner apart from the big wooden door which divides the toilet/shower room with the living and sleeping space, that means if I go to take shower, my friend cannot go in the toilet as there is no door inside. The "partition" between the bathtub and the bedroom area can be opened from both direction, means that your friend can open it and watch you to take shower....! Next room should be having party and too noisy, woke us up in 2am!

sample_comments.title: hotel is lacking details
sample_comments.text: the hotel is located at the beautiful and impressive china beach which totally makes up for the cold atmosphere of the hotel. the hotel is a huge beton block without the details which make a hotel warm and cozy. if the weather is nice enough to be outside the whole day you might be able to ignore that shortcoming but with rain it gets even more depressing. service is friendly and food delicious even though expensive for a location like danang. all other 5 star hotels are the same though.
sample_comments.positives: located at China beach

sample_comments.title: Fantástica estadia em Danang
sample_comments.positives:
Hotel lindo com uma incrível piscina infinita sobre a praia !
A localização é excelente pois permite ir de táxi até a My Khe Beach (5 minutos) e regressar a pé pela praia (15 minutos pela areia).
A praia do hotel é semi-privada mas a energia é magnífica e os finais de tarde / pôr-do-sol são inesquecíveis. 
Os restaurantes são de qualidade superior !!

A chegada tivemos um pequeno contratempo com a reserva do quarto e o número de camas (inferior ao pretendido), que foi prontamente resolvido pela equipa do hotel - simpáticos e prestáveis. 

O melhor hotel onde ficamos até ao momento no Vietname.

sample_comments.title: Service needs improvement
sample_comments.text: Overall comments that we had - Quality of the room was reasonably good, not luxurious and I would say fair value for money. The spread at the breakfast was good but I spent all my time at the local Vietnamese breakfast section which was pretty good with all the congees and noodles/ pho every day. However, we had a couple of unpleasant experiences during our stay. The shuttle bus to pick us up from Hoi An did not turn up on time and we did not know whether it was coming plus it was pouring that night. We were also thinking of getting a local taxi back but there was no taxis at that time too.Fortunately the pick up from the hotel arrived and we landed back in the hotel. It would be necessary that the hotel ensured that there is prompt pick up and proper communication of any delays say via the bus terminal staff so that hotel guests know what to expect and not have to be left on our own.
sample_comments.positives: Excellent breakfast

今回他のホテルにも滞在したが、朝食についてもおいしいと思えなかった。

sample_comments.title: Boutique hotel by the sea
sample_comments.text: Lifestyle Resort is situated just beside the popular Furama hotel. They are both facing the same South China Sea and have a stretch of beautiful clean white beach. We chose Lifestyle over Furama as it was more economical. It had a clean and sleek feel. We encountered a bad sewage smell lurking from the bathroom. Their maintenance guys did not manage to resolve the problem. As we were staying the last night, we didn't take up the hotel's offer of changing rooms. Another issue we had was that the water was cold when returned to the hotel around 9pm, they explained that they switched off the water pump to conserve energy. We had to turn on the water for 10min before it became warm again. I liked the hotel as a whole but our experience could have been better if the 2 issues were resolved.

nice hotel, big rooms with a nice big bubble bath tub.

kids club is far from main building. very minimum things to do with the most worn out toys. no scheduled activities. will put kids in front of the tv. worst of all kid's club is located next to basement parking for their staff's motorcycle. the whole place is polluted with motorcycle's fumes and smells of oil spill. 

went for the hotel tour, staff actually recommended outside tour and asked to pay upfront. very dodgy dealings and recommends restaurant that is practically abandoned. worst kind of recommendation.

staff will come in to clean the room and turn down despite the "dnd" sign put up.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful grounds with no personality
sample_comments.text:
As you can see in the pictures Lifestyle Resort has beautiful grounds and an amazing pool. The room was very spacious and had very nice outdoor spaces, including a large dining room table and 2 separate sitting spaces. The hotel was very clean. The shuttle service from the airport was prompt and friendly. The check in process was quick and smooth. The included breakfast had a great mix of western and asian options.

The biggest opportunity for this resort to become great is for it to create a stronger, personalized holistic experience. It lacked energy and personality. It felt sterile and the workers although very nice and accomodating seemed blah. No passion for the resort or experience. Because of this it did not feel like a resort. It felt like a hotel by the beach with a nice pool. Resorts should create a holistic experience that you want to tell your friends about. 

There was a beautiful pool and an open air restaurant by the pool but no music and it no good system of waiters coming to the pool and taking orders for drinks. The beach was very clean but very large grounds. It was annoying to have to walk all of the way to the pool restaurant to order food and then someone would bring it to you and they would be very tired and sweaty from all of the walking. I highly recommend that the resort invests in more workers to provide bar and beach food service. Or invest in a separate structure closer to the beach area to service the guests.

Overall I would consider staying here again because of the spacious, clean rooms and beautiful pool but would have better expectations of a boring resort without a lot of energy.
sample_comments.positives: Grounds were beautiful, great pool, quiet beach, spacious room with great outdoor space

My mistake, was under the impression that I had booked a Club/Executive room...(no room types at the resort) so this was a bit of an issue. I arrived early, requested early check-in, was thinking there was a club lounge separate check-in. However, my greeter informed that check-in was at 1500 hrs (it was 1130), I said no problem, is there a club lounge...she pointed upstairs... to which there was just a room with chairs, cookies, and water, no tv... i laughed a bit... then proceeded back downstairs to reception, avoiding the greeter... The Assistant Manager, took wonderful care of me, as I was just hoping to hold the bags, she checked me into a room, per my request. I was obviously a lucky one, as many others would have to wait until rooms were available.
Good stay. Fun happy hours.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Resort ở trung tâm nên việc di chuyển thuận tiện, không tốn nhiều thời gian. Nhân viên thân thiện, yêu trẻ, thái độ tốt không có điểm gì để chê về nhân viên ở resort.
sample_comments.negatives:
Mình đã đánh giá 5 sao trên tripadvisor vì nhân viên resort nhờ đánh giá và ban đầu không có ý định đánh giá lại qua booking nhưng vì trải nghiệm lần đầu ở resort tệ đến vậy nên xin phép đánh giá lại qua booking.
Gia đình mình đi nghỉ dưỡng và đã đến Đà Nẵng cả chục lần, 3 năm gần đây đều đi Đà Nẵng với mục đích nghỉ dưỡng gia đình nhưng lần đầu tiên trải nghiệm ở resort quá tệ.
Đầu tiên, về chính sách ngân hàng liên kết với resort yêu cầu người booking resort qua Booking.com cần là chính chủ ở phòng mới có thể thanh toán được thì chức năng book hộ phòng trên app có ý nghĩa gì? Mình nhờ người book phòng thêm cho bố mẹ và đã thanh toán nhưng khi đến resort thì nhân viên báo do không phải người book ở nên việc thanh toán sẽ refund lại và cần thanh toán lại và đây là chính sách của ngân hàng liên kết với resort??? Nếu vậy chức năng này trên booking có ý nghĩa gì và khách là mình không hiểu bản chất việc cần chính chủ book mới thanh toán được này là gì trong khi nhân viên chỉ nói đây là chính sách của ngân hàng liên kết với resort. 
Tiếp theo, bãi biển của resort quá đông, không có sự riêng tư. Nhân viên trực ở hồ bơi không rõ làm gì khi khách gặp sự cố ngay trước mặt, bị ngụp nước hồ bơi hô cứu nhưng không một ai nhảy xuống và đứng trên bờ nhìn???
Và cuối cùng là MẤT ĐIỆN LÚC 4h30 sáng??? 
Lần đầu tiên đi ở resort vào mùa hè, có con nhỏ 2 tuổi mất điện lúc 4h30 sáng. Do lỗi mất điện và lỗi chuyển máy phát trong resort đến 15p sau chưa có điện và kết quả là con mình nóng vã mồ hôi, dậy khóc. Thực sự quá tệ, tệ đến mức không bao giờ muốn quay lại resort mặc dù nhân viên belt và lễ tân rất thân thiện nhưng không kéo lại được trải nghiệm quá tệ khi ở resort lần này.

Phòng khách sạn và nhà vệ sinh bố trí hợp lý, ở thoải mái. Bữa sáng xuất sắc, đa dạng, nhiều món ăn, đồ uống. Gia đình tôi đặc biệt thích quầy trứng và đồ ăn nước (mỳ , phở) . Thái độ của toàn bộ nhân viên rất tốt . Cách vận hành chung của khách sạn rất chuyên nghiệp, hiện đại , đẳng cấp, và tôi thấy xứng đáng với giá tiền.
sample_comments.negatives: Điều tôi thấy hơi phiền là buổi tối có nhiều khách gọi đồ ăn về phòng, sau đó họ để bát đĩa và đồ ăn thừa ra ngoài hành lang. Tuy nhiên vào lúc 7h30 sáng khi tôi đi ăn sáng thì thấy vẫn chưa được dọn. Nó tạo cảm giác không ok vào lúc sáng sớm. Khách sạn có thể bố trí người dọn đồ vào lúc sớm , hoặc nói khách chủ động gọi lễ tân để dọn thay vì các phòng để đồ ăn ra ngoài hành lang.

sample_comments.title: Quiet, relaxing stay
sample_comments.text: We spent 2 nights at the Pullman. Although a little expensive for the quality, we did find the Epice restaurant and staff friendliness outstanding. Downsides were the bathroom needed a refurb, it was looking a bit tired and bath physically creaked when I got in and out. Lounger covers were in need of refreshing. Although saying this, beach was nice, pool ok, bathroom amenities (rainfall shower and bath) were good. We have stayed in much cheaper hotels in the area, 4 star, which we felt were just as good, except for the competence of the staff. Staff are extremely attentive here which makes the hotel gain its stars.

A little bit far from downtown Danang (8km). If you want to be near Danang city, this is not the hotel to stay. But if you are looking for sun, sea and relaxation - this is a great choice! I will come back

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel, fast service, close to city
sample_comments.text:
LifeStyle Resort has a really nice high-end spa resort feel to the place, with the amazing water feature that seems to stretch to the horizon, and the open concept all day cafe that really offers beautiful views of the gardens. 

It is a fairly compact hotel, you won't have to walk far to get to your room, and plenty of open space and sunlight.

We stayed in the hotel block, not the villas, and the only downside is there is a fair bit of noise from the corridor, as there is no carpeting to absorb pedestrian noise. So if you are a light sleeper, please bring ear plugs!
sample_comments.positives: Attractive gardens, spa-like ambience

sample_comments.title: The location has potential, but do not manage it like a cash cow.
sample_comments.positives:
The breakfast was ok. Also the pool area and beach were very nice. The normal rooms had very nice views of the property and swimmingpool and sea. Do not book the overpriced junior suite! Because you get no nice views and it lacks totally a good atmosphere. 
The concierges were nice and given us a good time after all. Also the use of the free sports bikes was a big plus. The massages was also nice and reasonable priced. I think i would given the resort a good review when they solved the issue of the room. I think It is not nice to book the second expensive room of the resort and you get a totally different room that was explained on the website of booking. I think it is not acceptable.
sample_comments.negatives: We have booked a junior suite and we got a spacious room without many windows. There was no nice views and it felt that we got a room at the end of the world. No views to the sea and swimming pool what was especially was explained to us on the website. They offered other rooms to us but all of them was not what we expected. One had the views what we expect but was on the ground floor where everyone was walking by to go the swimming pool. We would like to pay more for a better experience but nothing was offered to us. That was a very bad beginning of our stay. The cleaning ladies and waitress were doing a very good job. But very bad management that not keep in mind the needs of the customer. After two days i have asked again for an other room, but then again they offered us none. The last night there was a poker tournament in the hotel. We had a lot of noice of people shouting in the hallways till 3 o clock in the morning. Wich management thinks it is a good idea to arrange a poker tournament in a five star luxury resort where a lot of people are coming for relaxation.

sample_comments.title: Its a nice Hotel with friendly staff.

We had a nice room (very clean and quiet). We missed additional Towel rails in the bad room. Additionally it will be nice if the guest can keep the towels longer if he like.
But general room and as well the way to the room with a stroller is working inside the Hotel very well. It would be great if the Hotel entrance have as well a direct ramp to enter the Hotel with the stroller or wheelchair.
We very happy to find that Hotel!

sample_comments.title: Decent stay if the sound-proofing issue is managed.
sample_comments.positives: Rooms were spacious. All the staff were very courteous and always had a smile on their face. Check-in & Check-out process was smooth and with no hassle. Breakfast was decent with an extremely wide variety of choices from Vietnamese, Western and Asian dishes
sample_comments.negatives:
The sound-proofing of the hotel is non-existent. You can hear everything from your room, the doors slamming shut, dishes and plates being picked up, people chit chatting, footsteps, you get the idea. It just about ruins everything basically. Bathroom design is kinda weird with the rain shower being 2 steps away from the shower controls. 
Reception area is boring and plain. Nothing that screams class or the standards of Pullman that I am used to.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: The bellman and restaurant staff were particularly polite and attentive. They were very thoughtful. Breakfast had a variety of options and you could take your time. Especially, there were many types of beverages. If you have time, you can swim in the pool even in December (it gets cold, so it's difficult after the evening). The room is comfortable as well. Instead of checking the map, you can even walk to My Khe Beach, and using Grab makes transportation easy. There is a deposit required (refunded the next day).
sample_comments.response:
Dear SATOMI san,

Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. 

We are delighted to hear that our bellmen and restaurant staff provided attentive and thoughtful service, and that you enjoyed our breakfast selection and drink variety.

We are also glad that you found the rooms comfortable and appreciated our convenient location within walking distance to My Khe Beach, as well as easy access via Grab. It's great to hear that you were able to enjoy the pool in December, despite the cooler weather later in the day.

Thank you again for taking the time to share your experience. We hope to welcome you back for another enjoyable stay soon!

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.) 
Guest Experience Manager

Love the huge one bedroom cottage.
Hotel pool is very big and nice next to a quiet private beach. Just too bad the weather was too hot even from 8AM in morning so we couldnt enjoy much outdoor.

One complain we had was that the hotel next door had an event with loud noise, and our cottage is located nearest to beach so the noise were really loud from our room. We were initially told it will last until 10PM then it got extended till midnight and when we complained they just told us its decision from other hotel so they couldnt do anything. The hotel did offer us to move to another room but moving room in the middle of the night with baby and loads of equipments was really not an option. After much complaining the hotel compensated us with free transfer to Bana Hill and upgraded our room in Mercure Bana Hill since it's from same group. 

Overall we love the cottage and facilities but less one star due to the bad experience with the way hotel handling the noise issue.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing resort
sample_comments.positives:
Quite a nice and relaxing stay- it was very quiet throughout the whole hotel with not many people around, however, was off peak season. 
The rooms were clean, tidy and comfortable. 
Decent location as situated on the beach, and if you're happy to walk around 15 mins to a more busy area. Staff were readily available and friendly however were quick to up sell / let you know of additional prices.
sample_comments.negatives:
Quite expensive for what it is in terms of quality; compared to other similar priced 5 star hotels in Vietnam. Seemed to be very money orientated where from check in, was provided a list of damage / loss costs which was strange, to the mini bar being taken away as we did not have VND to hand for a deposit although we offered to exchange some AUD and pay. 
Any additional things, you will be charged for. Room was supposed to be a bay view but had limited view of the bay on level 4 and a cost to upgrade to a higher floor / closer to the beach. 
Breakfast was overly priced, with what seemed as a lot of not much where options were fairly limited especially if you don't like seafood and are staying a good few days. 
Have to purchase tennis balls and hire rackets to use the court, again at an inflated price. 
Spa was quite expensive, jacuzzi was room temperature-not heated and pretty boring. 
Beach out front had a lot of washed up litter, ended up doing a family litter pick in front and around the hotel beach. 
Overall: on the lower end of a 5 star resort.

sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for your feedback and we all look forward to welcoming you back at Pullman Danang Beach Resort in the near future.

sample_comments.title: excellent.
sample_comments.positives: Swimming pool was really great, amazing staff (with one exception at check-in), wi-fi, beach. Laundry was good. Room service. TV with plenty of channels to choose from (it does rain in Da Nang in December).
sample_comments.negatives: Minibar was emptied because I did not like the deposit idea. Same thing with my friend at check-in. Once we put this behind us we had a great time.

sample_comments.title: good
sample_comments.text: good

sample_comments.title: A Picturesque Resort with a few Hiccups...
sample_comments.positives: The suite was well appointed with all the amenities one could ask for. The rooms were spacious and clean. The Breakfast was excellent. The facilities were great.
sample_comments.negatives:
It seems like the staff need better training when dealing with customers as we faced some issues.
When we checked in, we had opted for an extra bed which was included in our room rate, but we were told that it would cost extra. After showing the staff the booking.com screenshot and after much deliberation, they finally conceded that it was included. 
The breakfast staff made it a habit to let us know that we would have to pay extra for the child's breakfast which was not included in our room rate. Once again we had to keep showing them the screenshot which clearly mentions that the rate was inclusive of breakfast for all persons. This became a joke for us daily.
In all the staff were very friendly but could not take any decisions and had to refer to their managers for all queries.

sample_comments.title: Good value and fun
sample_comments.text: Hotel is on a stretch of long and wide beach, which is very clean. There is a little playground on the beach for kids. The hotel restaurant has good food but a little pricey. Rooms are comfortable and staff friendly

sample_comments.title: Great service, beautiful room and gardens
sample_comments.positives: Family suite was generous size and luxurious. Service was excellent
sample_comments.negatives: Hard to justify in house expenses with so many cheaper options surrounding

sample_comments.title: it is greater inside
sample_comments.text: It is much nice when you get inside building and is very clean. really enoyed staying there.
sample_comments.positives: Swimming pool. breakfast. Room

sample_comments.title: Great staff, good location, but expensive for what it is.
sample_comments.positives: Lovely staff at this hotel, with a great location on Da Nang beachfront and a 10-15 minute walk to the main tourist areas. Fabulous breakfast.
sample_comments.negatives: This was by far the dearest hotel on our tour of Vietnam, and for the price, I expected a little bit more. Its not the same standard as other Pullman Hotels in Europe and the Middle East. I'm nitpicking, but for the price I would have expected a turn-down service and mattresses on the uncomfortable sun beds. I also would have expected one of the two bars to stay open past 10pm. Those are minor details and had the hotel been more reasonably priced, I wouldn't mention them.

sample_comments.title: Great stay at Pullman Da Nang
sample_comments.positives: Great private beach, nice pool, helpful staff

sample_comments.title: Very relaxing couple of days.
sample_comments.positives:
Very luxurious resort.
Good service
Excellent breakfast
sample_comments.negatives: The add ons are very expensive relative to Vietnam costs.

sample_comments.title: Pullman scores with service
sample_comments.text: Great, for full breakfast, amenities eg beach soccer/volleyball, swim pool, tennis. However, missing table tennis, kids indoor play area and activities. Hotel should try to remove mould on bath tub, upgrade to bigger screen HD TV
sample_comments.positives: Service -they fixed my damaged zipper on luggage bag, concierge recommended lam vien restaurant, got us a taxi to hoi an when the shuttle was full

sample_comments.text: Standing on silent beach, room is mervelous, good hospitality, aewsome breakfast
sample_comments.positives: Room Beach Breakfast

sample_comments.title: Nice Resort of Danang
sample_comments.positives: Pool, beachside and nice hotel bar

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Loved it. Great ambience. Good service

sample_comments.title: Pullman Danang Beach Resort
sample_comments.text: We really enjoyed being able to relax in the dining car, it made all the difference. The service on the train and at the hotel was exceptionally good. the staff were consistently friendly and helpful. Early check ins and late check outs at no extra cost made it even easier. The buffet breakfast was good. The only drawback was that the complimentary evening meal we were offered as part of the package at the hotel was extremely disappointing.

sample_comments.title: Great choice for chill and relax
sample_comments.positives: The facilities were amazing: the pool, the beach, restaurants and wellness. We could just spend days there doing nothing.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful
sample_comments.positives: Great location to the city and attractions, friendly and helpful staff, area is big

sample_comments.title: Beach resort in quieter area
sample_comments.positives:
Right on the beach, nice pool
Staff were excellent. Jenny on reception and Lan both outstanding customer service
sample_comments.negatives: Bit far away from town, but Grab cheap enough

sample_comments.title: a great holiday for my wife and me
sample_comments.text: This was one of the best holidays we have in years - the breathtaking view of the ocean right from the hotel reception, the attitude and courtesy extended by the staff and the manager as soon as we arrive, the room, the restaurents, the spa, the pool - endless moments of happiness - every dollar worth spend! A special word of thank to the chef - who makes tailor made delicacies for us each night - we never expect to have such good food. This speaks volume about the effort of the managers and leaders in each aspect of the management who puts great thoughts, develop the right policy guidelines and train their people relentlessly - me comming from a hospitality industry - knows perfectly well how hard and tiresome this is to receive appreciation from the customers - I would definitely like to go back to the hotel again to spend a long week...
sample_comments.positives: Staff Aiitude, Management Attitude, Cleanliness and Food

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
I had a wonderful stay at Pullman. The staff were genuinely lovely and incredibly accommodating with my food intolerances, which made a huge difference to my experience.
The location is excellent --- right on the beach --- and the grounds are massive, beautifully maintained, and very peaceful. I stayed in a penthouse suite, which was absolutely amazing. Being able to hear the waves from the balcony was a real highlight, and the private jacuzzi was a lovely touch.
The hotel feels spacious and relaxing, and everything is very well organised. The gym was fine, though I do think it could be more extensive for a resort of this size.
Overall, a great stay with warm, attentive staff, a fantastic beachfront setting, and a very high standard of accommodation

Daisy was amazing also
sample_comments.negatives: Gym could he improved. Hotel is very solid but could be updated in areas

sample_comments.title: great location but no acoustics in room
sample_comments.text: all public spaces in this hotel are fantastic. This use to be a Life Resort that was converted to a pullman so it does look very eco-friendly. the pool is open until +10PM so it is a chance for a night swim if desired. the surrounding are incredible by day and more at night. The rooms are superb. clean and comfortable. the Employees are very attentive to all our requests. All was great until we decided to settle down for the night. It is when the lack of acoustics between the rooms became evident. our neighbour decided to party until 3 am and we could hear all of their murmurs. THe hotel is also family friendly so family will usually have more than one room and you can hear every time a door is shut. All the hard surfaces in the corridor create the sensation that you are sleeping next to a train track everytime someone with suitcase walk by. all in all facility would be better without the room noise.
sample_comments.positives: pool, empty beach, surrounding

sample_comments.title: Would stay again
sample_comments.positives: Service of staff was excellent, in particular guest service personel Nick. Helpful and friendly
sample_comments.negatives: Nil

sample_comments.title: Beautiful getaway
sample_comments.text:
Our stay at the Pullman was wonderful. The ample breakfast was a very great way yo start the day. Though the hotel has a family atmosphere, couples can still enjoy themselves. Loved having a morning and afternoon shuttle to Hoi Ann...because there's not a lot in Da Nang. Wish the shuttle came back later...or that we just stayed in Hoi Ann all together. Still, Day Nang was quaint and the hotel was great. 

The only thing that wasn't so wonderful was the spa services. They use cheap nail polish so a manicure/pedicure from there won't go very far. The massages were just okay for me. (My boyfriend liked his. Not "loved," but just liked.) There were additional taxes/fees for all spa services that aren't listed on the original price list, so that was a bit shady. All in all, that's the only questionable thing about the hotel. The facility looks new, the staff is uber friendly, and they offer free service to/from the airport.
sample_comments.positives: breakfast, private beach, service

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The people on the staff are excellent and breakfast is varied and delicious. The pool is very nice although the water gets rather warm in the hot weather.
sample_comments.negatives: The chairs in the dining room are very noisy when moved. Felt pads under the legs would fix this. There is no general sitting area that is air conditioned for relief from the heat.

sample_comments.title: It was a pleasant stay. Consider coming back
sample_comments.positives: Staffs are friendly, the ice-cream is great, the beach and pool are nice and relaxing

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Great location. Nice pool and beach.

sample_comments.title: Lovely 5 Stars Hotel with reasonable price
sample_comments.text:
We have fantastic stay in Lifestyle Resort Danang Hotel. The staff always keep trying hard to help us even they speaked poor english. 

We were taking 2 superior rooms which link together. The room is big and clean. 

I am very happy to stay here for 3 days 2 nights. The only comment is slow check in & check out procedure.
sample_comments.positives: Nice environment from the lobby to the butterfly park

sample_comments.title: Still a very nice stay; staff was friendly and helpful and the location was perfect.
sample_comments.positives: Amazing location and beach and pool were great.
sample_comments.negatives: Surprisingly noisy. Sounds of slamming doors and people talking loudly could be heard in the room.

sample_comments.title: Nice pool and beach
sample_comments.text: Pool and beach are good although cold when the weather turned bad as it did for half our four-day stay in March 2012. Didn't seem to be a popular hotel as not as many guests as its neighbour. Food at restaurant is good, although a bit exxy. I had the best piece of Aussie steak I've had in a long time here on our first night. Breakfast has ample selections and doesn't close until 1030 so no need to rush in the morning. Not much for kids to do if you can't use pool or beach. No DVD player in our Superior room.
sample_comments.positives: Not crowded

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
There were so many staff and every single one was exceptionally friendly and helpful.
The kids club was great. I was worried my 7 year old might be too old, but there was enough to keep her entertained a couple of hours a day.
Only one pool but it was a very good one.
The beach was lovely. Surprisingly clean and nice for swimming.

sample_comments.title: Location and serenity
sample_comments.text: we loved our stay here. it was clean, friendly staff, great location, food was great and a great view from the bar and pool bar
sample_comments.positives: Great breakfast. Friendly staff.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Lovely location, beautiful beach and well-designed hotel. Excellent breakfast buffet with huge range of international cuisine. Staff very helpful and welcoming.

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel, spacious room, superb beach view.
sample_comments.text: I'll definitely recommend this hotel to anybody who want to visit Danang. Just 10min drive to airport.
sample_comments.positives: Friendly staff, good breakfast, hv free return airport transfer & shuttle van to Hoi An city.

sample_comments.title: Pullman Resort Denang: come rain or shine you're gonna LOVE it here
sample_comments.positives: Despite this being off-season our experience at the Pullman Resort Danang was most excellent. The hotel is gorgeous, the rooms just brilliant, the food (at the main restaurant) delicious, the staff just wonderful and location location location... It's a must-try if you happen to be in Danang. We'll certainly be going back to stay there again. It was one of the best hotels we have stayed at in Asia. We just loved it.
sample_comments.negatives: Azure restaurant was very 'meh' compared to the main restaurant. It was also the beach restaurant, so I would have thought it would have had more allure. Food was ever so, so so. This is the only thing I can actually 'fault' at the Pullman.

sample_comments.title: Relaxed environment, customer service with a smile
sample_comments.text:
We were extremely happy with the service, accommodation and quality and affordability of the food. The Spa services had great variety which we took regular advantage of.
The spaciousness of the Penthouse apartment made this worth the additional cost.
The staff were very eager to please and forthcoming with suggestions on how to best spend our time in the region. 
Occasionally there were some challenges with language but all the staff were eager to engage in discussion with the guests, in part to improve on skills essential to working in this industry.
We had a wonderful time and highly recommend this Resort...
sample_comments.positives: Quality food, extremely helpful staff, excellent room

sample_comments.title: Slightly expensive looking at other resorts in Danang.
sample_comments.positives: The location was right on the beach , staff was excellent , response time of the staff was beyond expectation despite being almost fully occupied rooms were very specious. The buffet breakfast had lots of options , continental to local .

sample_comments.title: Friendly hotel
sample_comments.text:
Friendly service, quite, clean nice rooms at the superior level. good and high quality interior inside the rooms, nice balcony and view. a nice beach and a quality restaurant with a good selection of national and international food.
good is the airport shuttle service because the hotel is around 15 minutes far away from the city and the airport of Da Nang.
sample_comments.positives: How the hotel is build

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast is really good and there are many different choices.

sample_comments.title: Junior suite was great
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in a Junior Suite and it was heavenly! Small touches like water provided in the airport coach transfer, the welcome drinks at the lobby, daily small tokens such as biscuits and marshmallows were a bonus! 

The rooms were huge and finely furnished! The hotel were well maintained. The beach was smoothed almost every morning. The pool is beautiful! We had a really great stay and celebrated our first year anniversary there. We received flowers and a heart shaped cake on the day itself! 

Overall it was a memorable experience with a occasional hiccup like communication. That was understandable given that the people does not speak alot of English but the hotel takes effort in ensuring the staff improves on that by providing English lesson! Well
Done! 

The resort made our stay at Danang really memorable and that daily shuttles to hoi an was another bonus! 

We love it! Thanks you!
sample_comments.positives: The suite, pool and the beaxh

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Food is delicious

sample_comments.title: Great location, stunning resort
sample_comments.text: We had a really enjoyable stay at this resort. The room was a good size and comfortable. The restaurant was lovely and the food was fantastic. The service overall could have been improved but was still very good.
sample_comments.positives: Beachfront location, big rooms, cleanliness
sample_comments.negatives: Service

sample_comments.title: Really lovely hotel with fantastic staff
sample_comments.positives: The one bed room cottages are lovely. The pool staff were amazing

sample_comments.title: A conventional beach hotel, suitable for vacationing.
sample_comments.text:
I checked into a standard twin room at the beginning of April, located on the 2nd floor. The room is not very large, but the air conditioning is great and refreshing. There were no comments about geckos or insects, so there is no need to worry about cleanliness. The staff is very friendly. I wanted to join a paid yoga class, but there was only one class from 6-7 am, which was too early. Using the sports facilities also requires payment. The pool is outdoors, and going there at noon allows you to enjoy the intense sunlight.

However, I am not accustomed to the bathroom being separated from the room only by a piece of transparent glass. Although there is a curtain that can be lowered, it does not provide enough coverage, and I could see my friend's faint silhouette undressing behind the glass, which was somewhat awkward. There could be more hooks in the bathroom. The water pressure of the shower was quite weak, so I gave up washing my hair in the room and went to the spa center (where I could use the sauna and shower for free).
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. KA,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your stay with us.

We are pleased to know that you found your room clean and comfortable, enjoyed the refreshing air-conditioning, and appreciated the friendliness of our team. It is also reassuring to hear that your stay was not affected by the cleanliness concerns mentioned in other reviews.

Regarding the yoga class, we would like to kindly clarify that the 6-7 AM session is a complimentary group class, while paid yoga sessions can be arranged upon request at a preferred time. We are sorry for any misunderstanding this may have caused.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the bathroom layout, privacy concerns, limited hooks, and weak shower pressure. Your comments are very important to us and have been shared with the relevant departments for careful review and improvement.

We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Very clean. Very friendly and nice staff. Breakfast was fantastic. Comfortable room for a family holiday.

sample_comments.title: Second stay
sample_comments.text: I decided to stay here again because my previous stay was very pleasant. The breakfast has a wide variety and is delicious. This time the weather was bad so I couldn't enjoy the beach, but when the weather is nice, the hotel's private beach is amazing. The staff is very kind, and I would like to stay here again when I visit Da Nang.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Yuriko san,

Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us again and for sharing your kind feedback. We are truly delighted to know that your previous experience brought you back to us.

It's wonderful to hear that you enjoyed our breakfast with its wide variety of options. We're sorry that the weather did not allow you to fully enjoy the beach this time, but we're glad you still had a pleasant stay and appreciated the friendliness of our team.

We truly appreciate your continued trust and look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Danang for another memorable experience.

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.) 
Guest Experience Manager

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.) 
Guest Experience Manager

I was upgraded to a deluxe room for free, but even so, the room was compact, and the bed was quite small for a foreign hotel.

Thank you for your recent stay and for taking the time to leave a review of our hotel. It was a delight to learn that overall you had a positive experience with us and had found the staff friendliness and the breakfast delicious to be a highlight.

We do have a number of choices on our room types that provide bigger room size and we sincerely hope we will have another opportunity to welcome you back in the future when we will strive to make your stay more seamless and enjoyable.

Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: Another wonderful visit
